feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing below error Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing below error in Standard Replication iFlow in SAP CPI.

Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query failed with message "NullPointerException:while trying to invoke the method org.apache.catalina.TomcatPrincipal.getUserPrincipal() of a null object loaded from field org.apache.catalina.connector.Request.userPrincipal of an object loaded from local variable 'this'"

Please advice on the root cause and any steps need to be taken?

entry.title: Integration Advisor 1:1 mapping and
entry.content:
Hi experts,

is it possible to create a 1:1 mapping in Integration Advisor and change only one Field on the Target Side.
In SAP PO graphical mapping it was possible to click on a button an the mapping was created.

Or is it possible to use a custom XSLT.

 

I aggree that XSLT is more efficient and easier.
But is it possible ot use XSLT as MAG?
if yes how?

 

the xsl code works fine, but i want to add all other fields an sections 1:1 as easy as possible.

kind regards.

entry.title: Ariba import SupplierTaxRegistration via ITK
entry.content:
Hello,
I want to check anyone was able to successfully import SupplierTaxRegistration file in Ariba via ITK (import batch data) or is there any alternative way to import it via CPI.

entry.title: Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml .
entry.content:
Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml . not sure what is incorrect , any help will be highly appreciated

My xml –

<feed xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices xml:base=https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><author><name/></author><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet"/><entry><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><category term="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS.ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType" scheme=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType"/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')/Parameters" rel=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/Parameters type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="Parameters"/><content type="application/xml"><m:properties xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices><d:P_IDNUMBER>954100</d:P_IDNUMBER><d:IDNUMBER>954100</d:IDNUMBER><d:PARTNER>40000</d:PARTNER><d:COMPANYCODE>1000</d:COMPANYCODE></m:properties></content></entry></feed>

XPath –

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:COMPANYCODE

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:PARTNER

Runtime config- namepace mapping

xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata;xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices;xmlns:p1=http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN

entry.title: Setup SQI adapter connection to on-oremise SQL DB servers
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

As part of the SAP PI/PO to SAP BTP integration suite migration, I have a requirement to create MS SQL JDBC connection to on-premises MS SQL DB server in SAP Cloud Connector.

I am facing a challenge while creating a connection while following the naming convention as < SQL server >\<DB Instance>.

Please find below details and if anyone had faced such issues, kindly assist and if there is any workaround for this available also would be helpful.

 Business scenario:

Create a MS SQL JDBC connection to on-premises MS SQL DB server when the MS SQL server string is as: <SQL server>\<DB instance>. Example: SDESEQSQL191\SEQ2TEST

Configuration steps:

Create a TCP connection to a non-SAP system in SAP Cloud Connector
Create JDBC Data Source in Integration Suite.
Symptom:

When setting up the Access Control entry in SAP Cloud Connector, in the step to add the internal host and port, SAP Cloud Connector does not allow the naming convention as <SQL server>\<DB instance> throwing the error message below “Invalid or missing input”

SAP cloud connector version is: 2.17.2

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Rakesh Yadav

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment Cloud Connector SAP Integration Suite #SAP PI/PO Migration

entry.title: Resource 'pd:SAP_TPM_xxx:SOURCE_MSG_XSD:Binary' not found in Partner Directory
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on SAP B2B TPM - passThrough scenario development for X12-856 message type

While trying to execute interface I am getting below error - 

Resource 'pd:SAP_TPM_xxx6:SOURCE_MSG_XSD:Binary' not found in Partner Directory.

Any idea how to fix it?

Regards,

RJ

entry.title: Groovy and learning basics
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I am new to groovy and learning basics. I need know the documentation where I can know the methods that I can use in Groovy for CPÎ? and the libraries used.

For example .

getHeader

getProperties, etc

entry.title: Content-type when calling web hook from Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to call a an API on Service Now as a WebHook from SAP Event Mesh . The API only accepts the content-type application/json, but Event Mesh sets the content type to application/cloudevent+json, despite our settings.

We have configured the web hook to have a default content type of application/json, and I can see in the cloud event coming from S/4 that the content type is set as application/json

See attached screenshots of config and the relevant envelope.

What can we do make sure we always use application/json when calling this web hook?

Regards

Mattias

entry.title: Insert Issue in Groovy script within Json Loop
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to loop json payload and execute Hana sql query in order to insert record into Hana DB. 

Its inserting only one record and breaks the loop. If i change the Json attribute(subscriptionactiontype) by keeping execute query outside loop, then loop is getting executed as many lines as we have. No Issues at all. But if i keep execute query statement within a loop, loop is getting executed for only once . Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table from S/4
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement: Replicate the S/4 table into Hana Cloud and query the record from Iflow-Groovy script and modify the Json payload

(1) I did replicate on prem(S/4) table into Hana cloud.

(2) Query is working in SQL Console.

(3) I did small test via JDBC which is getting me a result what i need.

PostMan:

(4) When i implement the same query via Groovy script, its not working as expected.

(5) Groovy script:

(6) PostMan result:

Attribute value is not getting modified. Apparently query is not getting executed. Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: PaymentInformation upsert in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central through CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I have to update the bank details coming in a csv file to PaymentInformation portlet in Successfactors Employee Central to an entity PaymentInformationDetailV3.

We are receiving all the details except external code from source system. The external code is a key field in the PaymentInformationDetailV3, So I am unable to update the information with the below error.

PaymentInformationDetailV3 Upsert Failed for empId: 00002. Error msg: bad valueString [] as part of keyString [PaymentInformationV3_effectiveStartDate=datetime'2025-01-03T00%3A00%3A00',PaymentInformationV3_worker='00002',externalCode=]"

I have checked the below KBA's as well.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3000179
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002990468

The external code is an autogenerated field in Employee central, When the SF EC consultant update the information manually through import templates the external code is auto generated.

Please let me know how this field external code is to be mapped in sap cpi .

Regards,

Ramya

entry.title: Learning Strategies for Complex Groovy Scripts and Graphical Mapping
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding building knowledge about Groovy Script or Graphical Mapping. Both can become very complex during message transformations due to context changes or complex customer requirements. My question is, is there a good way to learn this? Are there any reference books, an SAP course focusing on this, or blueprints for  recurring message transformation available? Or have you gained your experience exclusively through practice in your projects?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Grovvy Script to read filename and usage substring operation
entry.content:
Team,

I am writing Groovy script in iFlow. Can some one helps me with a groovy script for substring operation on the filename. 

Thank you for your time.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: User Type for SAP CPI OData Adapter Usage
entry.content:
We are working on a CPI iFlow where we are calling an OData service which is residing in our on-prem system. Our on-prem system will be called via an APP ID(not dialog user). We created a security key for that in CPI tenant. On the adapter configuration, we are using basic auth and sending the security key. For OData configuration, when we go for connection to backend, on the popup screen it fails to fetch the metadata with error message "Please enter valid credentials". 

We later changed the type of the user(which we used in the security material) from "system" to "service" and it worked. Is there any mandate for this or can it be worked with other type of users as well? 

 

SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway @PriyankaChak @priyankachaksap

entry.title: Event Mesh activation in Integration Suite fails
entry.content:
Hi,

I added Manage Business Events (Event Mesh) from Manage Capabilities in Integration Suite and activated it in Configure -> Event Mesh and it shows Failed.

Even if I Deactivate the Event Mesh and reactivate it, it still shows Failed.
Please let me know if you know the cause or how to solve this problem.

Best Regards,
KuroKen.

entry.title: OData V4 Error.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where I'm making OData V4 POST call to S4HANA with standard OData api_safetydatasheetassessment. Now there is an extension to this API i.e SAP__self.UpdateSafetyDataSheetDocumentDetails which I'm providing manually because not getting this in Select Entity & Define Operations (attaching SS).

 

When I'm deploying the interface, I'm getting below error.

If anyone has worked on Product Compliance interfaces, please help me on this.

Please suggest some solution for this.


P.S : Already tried converting JSON to XML.
Also tried with HTTP adapter.  

 

Thanks in advance!! 😊

 


SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries   SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   Cloud Integration   SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Processing messages from dead message queue of SAP event mesh
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the best approach to process the messages from a dead message queue in SAP Event Mesh?

Does it make sense to me to create another iFlow to periodically read from DMQ using REST and process/put the message back to the main queue? Is there any manual way to put the messages from DMQ to main queue?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Replacement of Invalid JSON Element that fails JSON to XML Conversion doesn't work
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a payload like this:

{
"Name": "111000",
"UniqueName": "[Account].[Account].[GAPP Total G&A^G&A - MB^G&A DIRECT^G&A EMPLOYEE COSTS^29255]",
"Type": "Regular",
"Ordinal": 10767,
"IsPlaceholder": false,
"Weight": 1,
"Attributes": {
"Caption": "611055",
"Active": 1,
"Ignore Volume?": "Y",
"Variance Sign": -1,
"Forecast Input": "611055",
"RuleBased": "Y",
"OMGA": "GA",
"Legacy Element": "6110130 - VACATION ACCRUAL-LABOR",
"NameCode": "ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR (611055)",
"CodeName": "611055 - ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR",
"CodeNameLegacy": "611055 - ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR (6110130 )",
"Name": "ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR"
}
},

============================================================

Conversion of this payload to XML fails due to "Ignore Volume?" element:

============================================================

Tried this groovy script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Get the body as a String (assuming it's already a String)
def body = message.getBody(String)

// Perform replacements
def newBody = body.replaceAll("Ignore Volume?", "IgnoreVolume")

// Set the modified body back to the message
message.setBody(newBody)

return message
}

============================================================

Result:

Payload is remaining un-altered !

==========================================================

What is that I am missing.

 

Thanks,
SB

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite API Management mTLS on API Proxy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to know where to check client certificate uploaded for mtls. As per the help sap help mentioned after creating incident to enable mtls we need to share client certificate with sap in the shared drive provided by sap. I want to know where can we see that path which sap uploaded the client certificate.

Regards

Venkat.

entry.title: B2B monitoring API in SAP Integration suite
entry.content: Is there any standard API available for B2B monitoring in sap integration suite
